title: cyclocheilon eriantherum
intro: Cyclocheilon eriantherum, also known as the 'Khat-kat' plant, is a flowering plant native to the Eastern Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its stimulant and medicinal properties, as it contains alkaloids like cathinone and cathine, which can have various health benefits. The health benefits of Cyclocheilon eriantherum include improved mental clarity, increased energy, and potential anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, but due to its potential for abuse and addiction, its use is heavily regulated and should be approached with caution.
